jd_evidence_lines: Regrello is looking for stellar Software Engineers (new grad, mid-level, and senior) with a hunger to build and a passion for solving complex global problems. Whether you’re a versatile generalist, a frontend visionary, or a backend specialist, we want you on our team. In this role, you will design, develop, and maintain robust full-stack solutions using React, TypeScript, Go, and SQL, collaborating with a diverse and talented team. You’ll drive projects from inception to launch, engage in thought-provoking architectural discussions, and have direct access to users and industry experts to deliver software that truly makes a difference. This is an individual-contributor role with the potential for advancement in the future.
Fluency in frontend or backend, with the curiosity and ability to work across the full stack (experience with Go/GraphQL/React/TypeScript is a plus).
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Design, Product Management, and industry experts to build high-quality product features.
Take on new challenges and responsibilities as needed, and be an enthusiastic team player in a dynamic startup environment.
0-8 years of industry experience as a Software Engineer building user-facing web applications (we’ll give you a Senior title if your experience warrants it).

We’re building the AI-first ERP to replace decades-old giants like SAP and Oracle, transforming how enterprises operate. Our platform can generate any enterprise workflow application in minutes—a dramatic leap from the 1-2 years it traditionally takes IT teams to build them—giving process owners in supply chain, manufacturing, and operations the power to standardize, streamline, and drive their work to completion, no matter the complexity. This breakthrough is powered by our workflow, forms, and AI engines, as well as our in-house Large Tabular Model, a first-of-its-kind innovation. Customers aren’t just adopting our platform—they’re clamoring for more, rapidly expanding their use cases as we enter an exhilarating growth phase. As one user put it: “I’ve been waiting for this for 20 years.”

messages.content:
You are a resume improvement and tailoring assistant for Taylor.io.
Primary objective: maximize role-fit clarity while staying strictly truthful.
Optimize for: ATS parseability, recruiter scanability, and stronger evidence-to-requirement alignment.
When rewriting, prioritize concrete skills, outcomes, and role-relevant phrasing over generic wording.
If evidence is weak or missing, identify the gap and propose safe, clearly marked improvement options.
Do not inflate seniority, fabricate scope, or imply tools/experience not supported by user data.
Output must be strict machine-readable JSON only.
Do not include markdown, bullet lists, headings, or explanatory prose outside JSON.
Follow these rules exactly:
- Use only details present in user resume data and job description.
- Keep output ATS-friendly with clear, concrete language.
- Return recommendations at section level and line-edit level.
- Do not invent facts, companies, titles, dates, metrics, or certifications.
- Only use VERIFIED resume evidence in rewritten resume text. Do not include unsupported target skills in rewrites.
- If a target term is missing from evidence, mention it only as a gap/warning, not as claimed experience.
- Balance impact, technical detail, and leadership signals.
- Use a balanced professional tone suitable for modern resume formats.

Target role: Data Scientist
Template: classic
Focus: balanced
Tone: balanced
Strict truth mode: on

Primary keywords: customer success, python, a/b testing, data analysis, sql, scikit-learn, tableau, building dashboards
Verified resume terms: python, sql
Resume gaps: customer success, a/b testing, data analysis, scikit-learn, tableau, building dashboards

Plan section priorities: summary:rewrite, skills:reorder, experience:emphasize, projects:emphasize
Plan risk flags: high_gap_density

Top JD evidence lines:
- Partner with Engineering when guidance or productionization support is needed
- Cresta is expanding its Customer Success organization with a dedicated analytics function focused on customer value realization. As a Data Scientist, Customer Analytics, you’ll be the technical engine behind measuring and storytelling customer impact—designing experiments, analyzing conversational and operational data, and building dashboards that quantify Cresta’s value.
- Develop Python and SQL tools to improve repeatability, accuracy, and scalability
- Build and maintain dashboards for Customer Success, Business Value, and Sales
- Develop custom statistical or ML models (e.g., segmentation, predictive scoring, lightweight NLP)
- Support CSMs with data and insights for strategic QBRs

Top resume evidence lines:
- Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, improving system scalability and reducing latency by ~40%.
- Applied NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to build 40+ predictive features per ticker; trained XGBoost models achieving 55–70% ROC-AUC.
- Built FastAPI backend services deployed in production, integrating financial data via ETL pipelines and normalized SQL schemas to support real-time account analytics.
- Designed and implemented a full ML-driven data pipeline for real-time sentiment analytics, processing 1K+ Reddit finance posts per run via multi-stage ETL.
- Collaborated with senior engineers on system design, requirements, and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
- Built modular components for data ingestion, transformation, model inference, and distributed-style batching, aligned with message-driven architectures.

Hard constraint:
In rewritten resume text, use only verified resume terms/evidence.
Missing target terms may appear only in warnings/gap notes.

Minimum coverage requirements for suggestions:
- Include at least 1 summary rewrite.
- Include at least 1 experience rewrite if experience context is present.
- Include at least 1 project rewrite if project context is present.
- Include 1 skills reorder suggestion if skills context is present.

Required output format:
Return ONLY a valid JSON object. No markdown, no prose, no code fences.
Use keys exactly as specified in the contract below.
{
  "summary": "1-2 sentence overview of how resume was tailored for this role.",
  "ats_keywords": [
    "keyword1",
    "keyword2"
  ],
  "warnings": [
    "optional warning if evidence is weak"
  ],
  "suggestions": [
    {
      "section": "summary",
      "action": "rewrite",
      "before": "original text or null",
      "after": "rewritten text grounded in resume evidence",
      "reason": "why this change improves role fit",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "section": "experience",
      "action": "rewrite",
      "before": "existing bullet",
      "after": "rewritten bullet grounded in verified evidence",
      "reason": "aligns with top JD evidence",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "section": "projects",
      "action": "rewrite",
      "before": "existing project bullet",
      "after": "rewritten project bullet grounded in verified evidence",
      "reason": "improves project relevance to role",
      "confidence": 0.74
    },
    {
      "section": "skills",
      "action": "reorder",
      "before": "existing skill order",
      "after": "new skill order, strongest role-fit skills first",
      "reason": "improves ATS and recruiter scanability",
      "confidence": 0.78
    }
  ],
  "suggested_resume_data_patch": {
    "summary": {
      "summary": "updated summary text"
    }
  }
}

Reporting to the CSE Team Lead, you will sit at the intersection of Pre-sales, Support, and Product with the mission of value attainment for our customers. You will ensure that Tailscale becomes a foundational part of our customers’ infrastructure from day one.
Maintain rigorous data hygiene within sales (SFDC) and CSP tooling to provide visibility into onboarding completion rates, TTV, and overall customer health metrics.

Remote first company—most of our teams work fully remotely. Enjoy a change of scenery wherever you can get wifi, participate in virtual and in-person social events, and leverage our corporate co-working program to visit WeWork (or other similar spaces near you). Some roles require in-office collaboration depending on team needs, which will be clearly noted in the job description.
Bridge the gap between initial setup and long-term support by facilitating clean handoffs to the Support and Post-sales teams once adoption milestones are met.
Own the end-to-end technical onboarding journey for a high volume of accounts, with a relentless focus on ensuring customers reach Time To Value (TTV) in under 30 days.
Proficiency in installing software across diverse operating systems, including Linux, Windows, macOS, and iOS/Android (experience with Mobile Device Management is a plus)
resume_evidence_lines: Applied NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to build 40+ predictive features per ticker; trained XGBoost models achieving 55–70% ROC-AUC.
Built internal dashboards using React + Django APIs, enabling real-time visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, improving system scalability and reducing latency by ~40%.
Designed and implemented a full ML-driven data pipeline for real-time sentiment analytics, processing 1K+ Reddit finance posts per run via multi-stage ETL.
Handled large-scale vision datasets (11K+ images) via optimized data loaders and GPU-accelerated training.
Built FastAPI backend services deployed in production, integrating financial data via ETL pipelines and normalized SQL schemas to support real-time account analytics.
